={
  "user_id": "{{ $json.user_id }}",

  "competitors": {{ JSON.stringify($json.competitors) }},

  "recommended_hashtags": {{ JSON.stringify($json.recommended_hashtags) }},
  "raw_research": {{ JSON.stringify($json.raw_research) }}
}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, phase: 1, session_id: 'session_' + Date.now(), data: $json }) }}
